## Description

A clear description of what needs to be done. This should be achievable by someone
new to the codebase.

## Why This is a Good First Issue

Explain why this is suitable for beginners:
- Well-defined scope
- Clear acceptance criteria
- Existing patterns to follow
- No complex architectural changes needed

## What Needs to Be Done

- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The feature/fix works as described
- [ ] Tests are added or updated
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (see `CLAUDE.md`)

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository: https://github.com/Awaiswilll/dweb
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/dweb.git`
3. Install dependencies: `cd dweb && npm install`
4. Start the dev server: `npm run dev`
5. Run tests: `npm test`

## Relevant Files

List the files that need to be modified:
- `src/views/...`
- `src/components/...`
- `tools/...`

We're happy to help!
